problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
